title: DONATION PROGRAM - 211info
text: ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICE DONATION PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Accepts year-round donations of non-perishable food, unused personal hygiene products, new or gently used linens, blankets, towels, pillows, adult winter clothing, coats, shoes, underwear, socks and books. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Tuesday/Friday 9am-noon, Wednesday 3pm-6pm Email (503) 488-7745 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Administration (503) 488-7745 Kelsey Stark Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in. Ring the bell at the door to contact staff. Call if assistance is needed in unloading donations. Email for further information. Please do not leave items unattended. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties Services: Bedding/Linen Donation Programs Book/Magazine Donation Programs Clothing Donation Programs Donation Drop Off Points Food Donation Programs Personal/Grooming Supplies Donation Programs If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. No Mapping Information Available
